remarks: Live the Westport lifestyle you've been dreaming of! Perfectly situated in one of Westport's most convenient neighborhoods, this charming renovated apartment places you just minutes from Compo Beach, the train, Saugatuck's renowned restaurants, Longshore Club Park, and downtown Westport. Filled with warmth and natural light, this inviting two-bedroom home features beautiful hardwood floors throughout, an open-concept living space with a skylight and decorative fireplace, and a well-appointed kitchen with granite countertops, a gas range featuring Air Fry mode, and a lighted ceiling fan. Efficient central air conditioning and heating, along with a newer roof, provide year-round comfort and peace of mind. Additional highlights include a private entrance, private attic storage with direct access from the unit, designated storage space in the shared basement, and a shared laundry area. Relax on your private front patio or enjoy the shared backyard, complete with additional storage beneath the deck. As an added benefit, the owner will retain the Compo Beach kayak rack membership; details are available upon request. Whether you're grabbing your morning coffee downtown, dining along the Saugatuck River, spending the day at Compo Beach, or catching the train into the city, you'll appreciate how effortlessly everything is within reach. Fixed utilities make life effortless. Welcome to 19 Hale Street...where convenience, charm, and the best of Westport come together.
